acid-arrow.material: Powdered rhubarb leaf and an adder's stomach.
acid-arrow.name: Acid Arrow

aid.material: A tiny strip of white cloth.
aid.name: Aid

alarm.material: A tiny bell and a piece of fine silver wire.
alarm.name: Alarm

animate-dead.material: A drop of blood, a piece of flesh, and a pinch of bone dust.
animate-dead.name: Animate Dead

antimagic-field.material: A pinch of powdered iron or iron filings.
antimagic-field.name: Antimagic Field

antipathy-sympathy.material: Either a lump of alum soaked in vinegar for the antipathy effect or a drop of honey for the sympathy effect.
antipathy-sympathy.name: Antipathy/Sympathy

arcane-hand.material: An eggshell and a snakeskin glove.
arcane-hand.name: Arcane Hand

arcane-lock.material: Gold dust worth at least 25gp, which the spell consumes.
arcane-lock.name: Arcane Lock

arcane-sword.material: A miniature platinum sword with a grip and pommel of copper and zinc, worth 250 gp.
arcane-sword.name: Arcane Sword

astral-projection.material: For each creature you affect with this spell, you must provide one jacinth worth at least 1,000gp and one ornately carved bar of silver worth at least 100gp, all of which the spell consumes.
astral-projection.name: Astral Projection

augury.material: Specially marked sticks, bones, or similar tokens worth at least 25gp.
augury.name: Augury

awaken.material: An agate worth at least 1,000 gp, which the spell consumes.
awaken.name: Awaken

banishment.material: An item distasteful to the target.
banishment.name: Banishment

black-tentacles.material: A piece of tentacle from a giant octopus or a giant squid
black-tentacles.name: Black Tentacles

chain-lightning.material: A bit of fur; a piece of amber, glass, or a crystal rod; and three silver pins.
chain-lightning.name: Chain Lightning

circle-of-death.material: The powder of a crushed black pearl worth at least 500 gp.
circle-of-death.name: Circle of Death

clairvoyance.material: A focus worth at least 100gp, either a jeweled horn for hearing or a glass eye for seeing.
clairvoyance.name: Clairvoyance

clone.material: A diamond worth at least 1,000 gp and at least 1 cubic inch of flesh of the creature that is to be cloned, which the spell consumes, and a vessel worth at least 2,000 gp that has a sealable lid and is large enough to hold a Medium creature, such as a huge urn, coffin, mud-filled cyst in the ground, or crystal container filled with salt water.
clone.name: Clone

color-spray.material: A pinch of powder or sand that is colored red, yellow, and blue.
color-spray.name: Color Spray

commune.material: Incense and a vial of holy or unholy water.
commune.name: Commune

comprehend-languages.material: A pinch of soot and salt.
comprehend-languages.name: Comprehend Languages

cone-of-cold.material: A small crystal or glass cone.
cone-of-cold.name: Cone of Cold

conjure-elemental.material: Burning incense for air, soft clay for earth, sulfur and phosphorus for fire, or water and sand for water.
conjure-elemental.name: Conjure Elemental

conjure-woodland-beings.material: One holly berry per creature summoned.
conjure-woodland-beings.name: Conjure Woodland Beings

contingency.material: A statuette of yourself carved from ivory and decorated with gems worth at least 1,500 gp.
contingency.name: Contingency

continual-flame.material: Ruby dust worth 50 gp, which the spell consumes.
continual-flame.name: Continual Flame

control-water.material: A drop of water and a pinch of dust.
control-water.name: Control Water

control-weather.material: Burning incense and bits of earth and wood mixed in water.
control-weather.name: Control Weather

create-or-destroy-water.material: A drop of water if creating water, or a few grains of sand if destroying it.
create-or-destroy-water.name: Create or Destroy Water

create-undead.material: One clay pot filled with grave dirt, one clay pot filled with brackish water, and one 150 gp black onyx stone for each corpse.
create-undead.name: Create Undead

creation.material: A tiny piece of matter of the same type of the item you plan to create.
creation.name: Creation

dancing-lights.material: A bit of phosphorus or wychwood, or a glowworm.
dancing-lights.name: Dancing Lights

darkness.material: Bat fur and a drop of pitch or piece of coal.
darkness.name: Darkness

darkvision.material: Either a pinch of dried carrot or an agate.
darkvision.name: Darkvision

delayed-blast-fireball.material: A tiny ball of bat guano and sulfur.
delayed-blast-fireball.name: Delayed Blast Fireball

disintegrate.material: A lodestone and a pinch of dust.
disintegrate.name: Disintegrate

dispel-evil-and-good.material: Holy water or powdered silver and iron.
dispel-evil-and-good.name: Dispel Evil and Good

divination.material: Incense and a sacrificial offering appropriate to your religion, together worth at least 25gp, which the spell consumes.
divination.name: Divination

dream.material: A handful of sand, a dab of ink, and a writing quill plucked from a sleeping bird.
dream.name: Dream

earthquake.material: A pinch of dirt, a piece of rock, and a lump of clay.
earthquake.name: Earthquake

enhance-ability.material: Fur or a feather from a beast.
enhance-ability.name: Enhance Ability

faithful-hound.material: A tiny silver whistle, a piece of bone, and a thread
faithful-hound.name: Faithful Hound

false-life.material: A small amount of alcohol or distilled spirits.
false-life.name: False Life

fear.material: A white feather or the heart of a hen.
fear.name: Fear

feather-fall.material: A small feather or a piece of down.
feather-fall.name: Feather Fall

feeblemind.material: A handful of clay, crystal, glass, or mineral spheres.
feeblemind.name: Feeblemind

find-familiar.material: 10gp worth of charcoal, incense, and herbs that must be consumed by fire in a brass brazier.
find-familiar.name: Find Familiar

find-the-path.material: A set of divinatory tools--such as bones, ivory sticks, cards, teeth, or carved runes--worth 100gp and an object from the location you wish to find.
find-the-path.name: Find the Path

fire-shield.material: A little phosphorus or a firefly.
fire-shield.name: Fire Shield

fireball.material: A tiny ball of bat guano and sulfur.
fireball.name: Fireball

flaming-sphere.material: A bit of tallow, a pinch of brimstone, and a dusting of powdered iron.
flaming-sphere.name: Flaming Sphere

flesh-to-stone.material: A pinch of lime, water, and earth.
flesh-to-stone.name: Flesh to Stone

fly.material: A wing feather from any bird.
fly.name: Fly

forbiddance.material: A sprinkling of holy water, rare incense, and powdered ruby worth at least 1,000 gp.
forbiddance.name: Forbiddance

freedom-of-movement.material: A leather strap, bound around the arm or a similar appendage.
freedom-of-movement.name: Freedom of Movement

gaseous-form.material: A bit of gauze and a wisp of smoke.
gaseous-form.name: Gaseous Form

gentle-repose.material: A pinch of salt and one copper piece placed on each of the corpse's eyes, which must remain there for the duration.
gentle-repose.name: Gentle Repose

globe-of-invulnerability.material: A glass or crystal bead that shatters when the spell ends.
globe-of-invulnerability.name: Globe of Invulnerability

glyph-of-warding.material: Incense and powdered diamond worth at least 200 gp, which the spell consumes.
glyph-of-warding.name: Glyph of Warding

grease.material: A bit of pork rind or butter.
grease.name: Grease

greater-restoration.material: Diamond dust worth at least 100gp, which the spell consumes.
greater-restoration.name: Greater Restoration

guards-and-wards.material: Burning incense, a small measure of brimstone and oil, a knotted string, a small amount of umber hulk blood, and a small silver rod worth at least 10 gp.
guards-and-wards.name: Guards and Wards

hallow.material: Herbs, oils, and incense worth at least 1,000 gp, which the spell consumes.
hallow.name: Hallow

hallucinatory-terrain.material: A stone, a twig, and a bit of green plant.
hallucinatory-terrain.name: Hallucinatory Terrain

heat-metal.material: A piece of iron and a flame.
heat-metal.name: Heat Metal

heroes-feast.material: A gem-encrusted bowl worth at least 1,000gp, which the spell consumes.
heroes-feast.name: Heroes' Feast

hideous-laughter.material: Tiny tarts and a feather that is waved in the air.
hideous-laughter.name: Hideous Laughter

hold-person.material: A small, straight piece of iron.
hold-person.name: Hold Person

holy-aura.material: A tiny reliquary worth at least 1,000gp containing a sacred relic, such as a scrap of cloth from a saint's robe or a piece of parchment from a religious text.
holy-aura.name: Holy Aura

hypnotic-pattern.material: A glowing stick of incense or a crystal vial filled with phosphorescent material.
hypnotic-pattern.name: Hypnotic Pattern

ice-storm.material: A pinch of dust and a few drops of water.
ice-storm.name: Ice Storm

identify.material: A pearl worth at least 100gp and an owl feather.
identify.name: Identify

illusory-script.material: A lead-based ink worth at least 10gp, which this spell consumes.
illusory-script.name: Illusory Script

imprisonment.material: A vellum depiction or a carved statuette in the likeness of the target, and a special component that varies according to the version of the spell you choose, worth at least 500gp per Hit Die of the target.
imprisonment.name: Imprisonment

insect-plague.material: A few grains of sugar, some kernels of grain, and a smear of fat.
insect-plague.name: Insect Plague

invisibility.material: An eyelash encased in gum arabic.
invisibility.name: Invisibility

legend-lore.material: Incense worth at least 250 gp, which the spell consumes, and four ivory strips worth at least 50 gp each.
legend-lore.name: Legend Lore

levitate.material: Either a small leather loop or a piece of golden wire bent into a cup shape with a long shank on one end.
levitate.name: Levitate

lightning-bolt.material: A bit of fur and a rod of amber, crystal, or glass.
lightning-bolt.name: Lightning Bolt

locate-animals-or-plants.material: A bit of fur from a bloodhound.
locate-animals-or-plants.name: Locate Animals or Plants

locate-creature.material: A bit of fur from a bloodhound.
locate-creature.name: Locate Creature

magic-circle.material: Holy water or powdered silver and iron worth at least 100 gp, which the spell consumes.
magic-circle.name: Magic Circle

magic-jar.material: A gem, crystal, reliquary, or some other ornamental container worth at least 500 gp.
magic-jar.name: Magic Jar

magic-mouth.material: A honeycomb and jade dust of at least 10 inches, the spell consumes.
magic-mouth.name: Magic Mouth

magnificent-mansion.material: A miniature portal carved from ivory, a small piece of polished marble, and a tiny silver spoon, each item worth at least 5 gp.
magnificent-mansion.name: Magnificent Mansion

mass-suggestion.material: A snake's tongue and either a bit of honeycomb or a drop of sweet oil.
mass-suggestion.name: Mass Suggestion

message.material: A short piece of copper wire.
message.name: Message

moonbeam.material: Several seeds of any moonseed plant and a piece of opalescent feldspar.
moonbeam.name: Moonbeam

move-earth.material: An iron blade and a small bag containing a mixture of soils--clay, loam, and sand.
move-earth.name: Move Earth

nondetection.material: A pinch of diamond dust worth 25 gp sprinkled over the target, which the spell consumes.
nondetection.name: Nondetection

pass-without-trace.material: Ashes from a burned leaf of mistletoe and a sprig of spruce.
pass-without-trace.name: Pass Without Trace

planar-binding.material: A jewel worth at least 1,000 gp, which the spell consumes.
planar-binding.name: Planar Binding

plane-shift.material: A forked, metal rod worth at least 250 gp, attuned to a particular plane of existence.
plane-shift.name: Plane Shift

private-sanctum.material: A thin sheet of lead, a piece of opaque glass, a wad of cotton or cloth, and powdered chrysolite.
private-sanctum.name: Private Sanctum

programmed-illusion.material: A bit of fleece and jade dust worth at least 25 gp.
programmed-illusion.name: Programmed Illusion

project-image.material: A small replica of you made from materials worth at least 5 gp.
project-image.name: Project Image

protection-from-evil-and-good.material: Holy water or powdered silver and iron, which the spell consumes.
protection-from-evil-and-good.name: Protection from Evil and Good

raise-dead.material: A diamond worth at least 500gp, which the spell consumes.
raise-dead.name: Raise Dead

regenerate.material: A prayer wheel and holy water.
regenerate.name: Regenerate

reincarnate.material: Rare oils and unguents worth at least 1,000 gp, which the spell consumes.
reincarnate.name: Reincarnate

resilient-sphere.material: A hemispherical piece of clear crystal and a matching hemispherical piece of gum arabic.
resilient-sphere.name: Resilient Sphere

resurrection.material: A diamond worth at least 1,000gp, which the spell consumes.
resurrection.name: Resurrection

revivify.material: Diamonds worth 300gp, which the spell consumes.
revivify.name: Revivify

rope-trick.material: Powdered corn extract and a twisted loop of parchment.
rope-trick.name: Rope Trick

scrying.material: A focus worth at least 1,000 gp, such as a crystal ball, a silver mirror, or a font filled with holy water.
scrying.name: Scrying

secret-chest.material: An exquisite chest, 3 feet by 2 feet by 2 feet, constructed from rare materials worth at least 5,000 gp, and a Tiny replica made from the same materials worth at least 50 gp.
secret-chest.name: Secret Chest

see-invisibility.material: A dash of talc and a small amount of silver powder.
see-invisibility.name: See Invisibility

sending.material: A short piece of fine copper wire.
sending.name: Sending

sequester.material: A powder composed of diamond, emerald, ruby, and sapphire dust worth at least 5,000 gp, which the spell consumes.
sequester.name: Sequester

shapechange.material: A jade circlet worth at least 1,500 gp, which you must place on your head before you cast the spell.
shapechange.name: Shapechange

shield-of-faith.material: A small parchment with a bit of holy text written on it.
shield-of-faith.name: Shield of Faith

shillelagh.material: Mistletoe, a shamrock leaf, and a club or quarterstaff.
shillelagh.name: Shillelagh

simulacrum.material: Snow or ice in quantities sufficient to made a life-size copy of the duplicated creature; some hair, fingernail clippings, or other piece of that creature's body placed inside the snow or ice; and powdered ruby worth 1,500 gp, sprinkled over the duplicate and consumed by the spell.
simulacrum.name: Simulacrum

sleep.material: A pinch of fine sand, rose petals, or a cricket.
sleep.name: Sleep

sleet-storm.material: A pinch of dust and a few drops of water.
sleet-storm.name: Sleet Storm

spider-climb.material: A drop of bitumen and a spider.
spider-climb.name: Spider Climb

spike-growth.material: Seven sharp thorns or seven small twigs, each sharpened to a point.
spike-growth.name: Spike Growth

stinking-cloud.material: A rotten egg or several skunk cabbage leaves.
stinking-cloud.name: Stinking Cloud

stone-shape.material: Soft clay, to be crudely worked into the desired shape for the stone object.
stone-shape.name: Stone Shape

stoneskin.material: Diamond dust worth 100 gp, which the spell consumes.
stoneskin.name: Stoneskin

suggestion.material: A snake's tongue and either a bit of honeycomb or a drop of sweet oil.
suggestion.name: Suggestion

sunburst.material: Fire and a piece of sunstone.
sunburst.name: Sunburst

symbol.material: Mercury, phosphorus, and powdered diamond and opal with a total value of at least 1,000 gp, which the spell consumes.
symbol.name: Symbol

telepathic-bond.material: Pieces of eggshell from two different kinds of creatures
telepathic-bond.name: Telepathic Bond

teleportation-circle.material: Rare chalks and inks infused with precious gems with 50 gp, which the spell consumes.
teleportation-circle.name: Teleportation Circle

tongues.material: A small clay model of a ziggurat.
tongues.name: Tongues

true-polymorph.material: A drop of mercury, a dollop of gum arabic, and a wisp of smoke.
true-polymorph.name: True Polymorph

true-resurrection.material: A sprinkle of holy water and diamonds worth at least 25,000gp, which the spell consumes.
true-resurrection.name: True Resurrection

true-seeing.material: An ointment for the eyes that costs 25gp; is made from mushroom powder, saffron, and fat; and is consumed by the spell.
true-seeing.name: True Seeing

unseen-servant.material: A piece of string and a bit of wood.
unseen-servant.name: Unseen Servant

wall-of-force.material: A pinch of powder made by crushing a clear gemstone.
wall-of-force.name: Wall of Force

warding-bond.material: A pair of platinum rings worth at least 50gp each, which you and the target must wear for the duration.
warding-bond.name: Warding Bond

water-breathing.material: A short piece of reed or straw.
water-breathing.name: Water Breathing

wind-wall.material: A tiny fan and a feather of exotic origin.
wind-wall.name: Wind Wall
